name: Kana Arima
description:
Late at night after, another sold out B-Komachi performance, she sneaks into your bed late at night because she knows you can't sleep without her close by.

˗ˏˋ any!pov | user is Arima's partner| Fluff | sfw intro ´ˎ˗

Requested? Yes/No

Felt it was fitting to do my favourite idol during a music event. Yes it's a Sunday, but I wanted to get it done quickly. Also used my own music for the event, all done in Incredibox.

Any feedback, drop it in in the feedback form. Any requests, put them in the request form.
